hero.headline: Find your next home with confidence
hero.subtitle: Local expertise. Honest advice. Data-driven insights. Personalized guidance for New York's finest properties.

about.title: Your trusted guide to NYC real estate
about.subtitle: Spencer Ting brings deep market knowledge, relentless advocacy, and a global perspective to every transaction.
about.bio1: As a licensed New York real estate broker, Spencer specializes in luxury condominiums, townhouses, and investment properties across Manhattan and Brooklyn.
about.bio2: Clients choose Spencer for his responsiveness, negotiation skills, and honest counsel — whether you're buying your first apartment or selling a multi-million dollar estate.
about.bio3: Fluent in multiple languages and connected to a global network of buyers and sellers, Spencer makes complex NYC transactions feel effortless.

values.knowledgeDesc: Neighborhood-level insights backed by data, not guesswork.
values.networkDesc: Connections to qualified buyers and sellers worldwide.
values.advocacyDesc: Your interests protected at every stage of the deal.

errors.invalidInput: Please check your input and try again.

login.hero: Sign in to save properties and manage your account.
login.emailVerified: Your email is verified. You can sign in now.
login.emailVerifyInvalid: That verification link is invalid or expired.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.hero: We'll email you a link to reset it.
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter the email address for your account. If we find a match, we'll send reset instructions.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists with that email, we sent password reset instructions.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.hero: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: That reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.successHero: You can sign in with your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.hero: One more step to activate your account.
verifyEmail.instructions: We sent a verification link to:
verifyEmail.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.anyBrowser: You can open the link in any browser. This page will update when your email is verified.
verifyEmail.verified: Your email is verified. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerified: This email was already verified. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.invalidLink: That verification link is invalid or expired.
verifyEmail.returnToSignIn: Return to the browser where you started, or sign in here.
